title: Executive Leadership Change
description: Schema for tracking executive and leadership role transitions at companies.

person_name.description: Full name of the executive. Commonly found in: press release headline, news article body, LinkedIn announcement.

person_linkedin_url.description: LinkedIn profile URL of the executive. Commonly found in: LinkedIn post link, executive bio section, company announcement.

company_name.description: Name of the company where the change occurred. Commonly found in: press release header, news article, LinkedIn company tag.

company_domain.description: Website domain of the company. Commonly found in: company website link, press release footer, company profile.

previous_title.description: Executive's previous title at the company or prior company. Commonly found in: press release body, LinkedIn profile history, news article bio.

previous_company.description: Executive's previous employer, if different. Commonly found in: press release body, LinkedIn work history, executive bio.

new_title.description: Executive's new title. Commonly found in: press release headline, announcement title, LinkedIn update.

new_company.description: Company where the executive is joining or taking the new role. Commonly found in: press release header, news article headline, LinkedIn company tag.

change_type.description: Type of leadership change. Commonly found in: press release context, news article classification, announcement language.

announcement_date.description: Date the leadership change was publicly announced. Commonly found in: press release date, article publish date, announcement timestamp.

effective_date.description: Date the leadership change takes effect. Commonly found in: press release body, announcement details, effective date mention.

announcement_source_url.description: URL of the original announcement source. Commonly found in: press release URL, news article link, LinkedIn post URL.

announcement_type.description: Type of source for the announcement. Commonly found in: site domain classification, content type, source format.

quoted_statement.description: Notable quoted statement from the announcement. Commonly found in: press release quote block, news article quote, executive statement.

source_url.description: URL of the page from which this data was extracted. Commonly found in: browser URL bar, canonical link tag, og:url meta tag.

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was extracted. Commonly found in: extraction metadata, scraper system timestamp.
